title: The Cherry Blossom Ring
overview: Shy student Taiyo's life is threatened when his vice principal reveals a dark secret.

title: The Yozakuras' Lifeline
overview: Taiyo and Mutsumi wed despite Kyoichiro's interference. Bomb threat leads to Taiyo's first mission.

title: Feelings
overview: Taiyo's training leads to a hellish life at the Yozakura Mansion, causing anguish for Mutsumi.

title: Kengo/Shinzo
overview: Mutsumi catches Kengo's incomplete report, igniting a spy game of tag as she tracks him down...

title: Interrogation/Date
overview: Hotokeyama arrests Taiyo and interrogates him about Mutsumi but lacks proof.

title: Bug
overview: Obsessed stalker Ayaka transfers to Taiyo's class, and aims to kill her crush after a data leak.

title: Government Spies
overview: Nanao eats a bioweapon while undercover; Taiyo joins the hunt, unaware it's to kill Nanao.

title: The Kuroyuri Party
overview: Mutsumi's visit to Hinagiku HQ ignites a clash between Rin and Kyoichiro.

title: The Flower Meaning of Kuroyuri (Black Lily)
overview: Ex-spy Kurogao kidnaps Deputy Prime Minister for revenge; Taiyo halts livestream to face him.

title: The Yozakura Family Maid/Affair
overview: Taiyo and Mutsumi are at a celebration party. Taiyo eyes a box with his dead family's info.

title: Yozakura Ghost Stories/Spy License
overview: Futaba faints as she has an intense fear of ghosts and curses. Siblings aid her phobia.

title: Prison Break Grandpa
overview: Ban escapes jail, takes Taiyo to club for grandkids' wedding, dodging Kyoichiro's capture attempts.

title: Tanpopo
overview: Taiyo uncovers parents' tie to Yozakura. He and Shion probe their fatal end in a deadly library.

title: Aim for the Suite Room
overview: Taiyo on a ship battles spies lured by Kyoichiro until a torpedo hits.

title: Yozakura Blood
overview: Taiyo investigates Kawashita; drugged Nohmen takes hostages. Shinzo aids, facing tough odds.

title: Cleaning the Yard
overview: Yozakura Mansion locks in all; Kyoichiro seeks ring thief; Mutsumi aids Taiyo.

title: Nanao’s Medicine
overview: Nanao's mutation needs a vaccine, forcing school exit. Taiyo aids him in preserving his school life.

title: Yozakura Hot Spring Story
overview: Yozakura family wins a unique hot spring trip, faces hurdles, then relaxes, but...?!

title: A Drug Called Tanpopo
overview: Taiyo sneaks on a train, tracking Tanpopo, seeking Momo, and a complaint sparks suspicion.

title: Sun Earrings
overview: Hakuja and Taiyo are in a fierce battle on the train, where she unveils the truth about his parents.

title: Yozakura Front Lines / The Blooming
overview: Kyoichiro and Yozakura plan attack on Tanpopo's lair; Taiyo preps with Ban.

title: Cherry Blossom Viewing Party
overview: Cherry blossom party lifts spirits before Skeleton Island siege on Tanpopo's plan.

title: Easterly Wind / Weapon
overview: Futaba fights Akai; Taiyo's team sneaks in, repels spear with Kurosawa's aid.

title: Shion & Kengo vs. Chacha & Aonuma
overview: Shinzo's Blooming wipes out mercenaries. Kawashita flees. Shion and Kengo battle Chacha and Aonuma.

title: Ai and Mizuki
overview: Taiyo and Kyoichiro find a video of Nanao attacked by Mizuki, who resents society over her past.

title: Old Blood
overview: Kawashita and Taiyo fight over the detonator. Taiyo's power floods Kawashita's mind with memories.

title: Mission Complete / Reception
overview: Taiyo corners Kawashita, but the Yozakuras' attacks fail. Taiyo tries again. Will it succeed?

title: Ai Comes To The Yozakura Family / Mini Kyoichiro
overview: Former Tanpopo executive Ai joins the Yozakura household to reform, but peace is soon threatened.

title: Winners and Losers
overview: Taiyo faces school chaos as Bronze Rank spy Sosuke Michibata targets him with sabotage and rumors.

title: The Big Bro Shinzo Safety Watch Team
overview: Shinzo’s shopping trip with Ayaka turns chaotic as Kengo and Nanao secretly assist him.

title: Spy Advancement Exam
overview: Taiyo faces Shinzo in a brutal game of tag during the first stage of the Spy Exam.
